ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF MICHAEL THOMAS. DEFENDANT BRIDGETT ARNOLD IS PRESENT. THE PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT PRIOR TO THE HEARING. IF THERE ARE NO APPEARANCES AT THE NEXT HEARING DATE MATTER TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
